templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: A mutual NDA that allows both parties to share confidential information with reciprocal protection. Includes standard terms for defining, protecting, and returning confidential information, with provisions for required disclosures by law, term and termination, and governing law.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) governing the provision of cloud services. Covers service levels, data protection, intellectual property rights, warranties, limitations of liability, and termination provisions for SaaS and cloud service providers.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Service Level Agreement (SLA) defining performance metrics, uptime guarantees, response times, and service credits for cloud and software services. Includes measurement methodologies, exclusions, and reporting requirements.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Data Processing Agreement (DPA) addressing GDPR and data protection requirements. Covers data processor obligations, data security, breach notification, data subject rights, and subprocessor engagements for GDPR compliance.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Professional Services Agreement (PSA) for engaging consultants, contractors, or service providers. Defines scope of work, deliverables, payment terms, intellectual property ownership, warranties, and termination for professional services engagements.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Design Partner Agreement for early-stage product development partnerships. Establishes framework for customers to provide feedback on pre-release products, including confidentiality, feedback licenses, beta access terms, and consideration provisions.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Strategic Partnership Agreement for business collaborations. Defines joint objectives, resource contributions, governance structure, intellectual property ownership, revenue sharing, confidentiality, and termination for strategic business partnerships.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Standard Software License Agreement for software licensing. Covers grant of license, usage restrictions, intellectual property protection, warranty disclaimers, limitation of liability, support and updates, and termination rights for software vendors.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Pilot Agreement for trial or proof-of-concept deployments. Establishes terms for conducting pilot programs including scope, duration, evaluation criteria, pricing, data use, confidentiality, and conversion to full agreement terms.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA compliance. Covers protected health information (PHI) handling, permitted uses, disclosures, security requirements, breach notification, and HIPAA regulatory compliance for healthcare-related services.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: AI Addendum addressing artificial intelligence and machine learning considerations. Covers AI usage rights, data processing for AI training, output ownership, limitations on AI-generated content, and compliance with AI regulations.

metadata.description: A collection of standard legal document templates from Common Paper, covering common business agreements for SaaS, professional services, data protection, partnerships, and more. All templates are licensed under CC BY 4.0 and free to use and modify.
